# claude_organization_invite (Resource)

An organization invite (`invite_...`): an email invitation for a user to join the organization with a given role. Invites cannot be updated; any change to `email` or `role` will destroy and recreate the resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claude_organization_invite" "example" {
  email = "developer@example.com"
  role  = "developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address of the user being invited.
- `role` (String) Organization role to grant to the invited user. One of `user`, `developer`, `billing`, or `claude_code_user`. Cannot be `admin` at invite time.

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the invite expires.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the invite (`invite_...`).
- `invited_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the invite was created.
- `status` (String) Current status of the invite. One of `pending`, `accepted`, `expired`, or `deleted`.
- `type` (String) Object type, always `invite`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import an existing organization invite by its invite ID (invite_...).
terraform import claude_organization_invite.example invite_015gWxCN9Hfg2QhZwTK7Mdeu
```
